_comment: OtoScout league registry — the SINGLE source of truth for every league. Both Python pipelines read it (pipeline/registry.py) and the Node read layer reads `strength` (lib/league-config.ts). Adding a league = add one entry here, run pipeline/update_coefficients.py (fills strength/avgElo from clubelo), then fetch. Fields: sofascore = Sofascore unique-tournament id; sofascoreSeason = the season string ScraperFC wants (cross-year 'YY/YY', calendar 'YYYY'); fbref = the FBref competition name; fbrefSeason = soccerdata season ('YYYY-YYYY' cross-year, 'YYYY' calendar); seasonStart/seasonEnd = months for soccerdata's custom-league config (cross-year Aug–May, calendar Mar–Nov/Dec); clubelo = clubelo.com country code (for the strength coefficient); espn = ESPN league code (for crest ids); strength = league-strength coefficient (1.0 = strongest), avgElo = its source. strength/avgElo are maintained by pipeline/update_coefficients.py.

eloSource.method: mean club Elo, top division, normalised to strongest = 1.0
